heroHeadline: Child Rescued from Rubble as Russia Intensifies Easter Aerial Strikes Across Ukraine
heroSubtitle: Russia ramps up aerial bombardment over Easter weekend, with rescue workers pulling civilians including children from the rubble of destroyed buildings amid sustained strikes on residential areas
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
